// SpellSiphon: Reading order: every // key is documentation; real settings follow in the same order.
// Enabled: Master switch for SpellSiphon patches and behavior.
// EnableImmersiveUseHooks: Immersive item-on-item UX via generic use handler.
// SpellsiphonToolWcid: WCID of the base Spellsiphon extraction tool.
// CoalescedManaWcids: WCIDs of the three Coalesced Mana tiers: Lesser, Greater, Aetheric (match world weenies).
// LesserBaseSuccessRate: Base success rate (percent) for Lesser Coalesced Mana extraction.
// GreaterBaseSuccessRate: Base success rate (percent) for Greater Coalesced Mana extraction.
// AethericBaseSuccessRate: Base success rate (percent) for Aetheric Coalesced Mana extraction.
// ArcaneLoreBonusPerPoint: Additional success rate per point of buffed Arcane Lore skill.
// MitTrainedBonus: Flat bonus to success rate if Magic Item Tinkering is trained.
// MitSpecializedBonus: Flat bonus to success rate if Magic Item Tinkering is specialized.
// MaxSuccessRate: Maximum possible success rate for extraction (hard cap).
// RareCrystalSecondarySuccessChance: Rare crystals: secondary roll after primary OK (0–1). Crafting dialog shows primary × this (e.g. 0.03 × 33% ≈ 1%).
// EnableAnyItemExtraction: Allow extracting spells from any spell-bearing item (not just gems).
// AllowAttunedAndBonded: Allow extracting spells from attuned and bonded items.
// LesserGreaterSafeOnFail: Lesser/Greater: source item is safe on extraction failure.
// AethericDestroysSourceOnFail: Aetheric: source item is destroyed on extraction failure.
// ExcludeTransferSpellNameContains: Spells matching these substrings are not transferred to equipment. Leave empty to allow all.
// DefaultItemMaxMana: Default maximum mana pool given to items that receive spells but previously had no mana pool.
// DefaultItemManaRegen: Mana regeneration rate (points per second) for items that receive a default mana pool.
// EnableLootgenGemMagic: Lootgen gem behavior: roll spells onto qualifying gems.
// MinSpellsOnLootgenGem: Minimum spells on a lootgen-tinkering gem.
// MaxSpellsOnLootgenGem: Maximum spells on a lootgen-tinkering gem.
// GemWcidAllowlist: If non-empty, only these WCIDs count as lootgen tinkering gems.
// IncludeCantrips: Include cantrip-tier spells when building the spell pool.
// IncludePortalRecallSummonOnGems: Allow portal/recall/summon-class spells in the gem pool.
// IncludeSpellNameContains: If non-empty, only spells whose names contain one of these substrings are candidates.
// ExcludeSpellNameContains: Spell names containing any of these substrings are excluded from the pool.
// EnableVendorSales: When true, SpellSiphon tools are sold at jewelers (vendors selling jewelry/gems).
// ManaLatticeWcid: WCID of the Mana Lattice — dedicated base for reusable buff gems.
// VendorPrice: Price in pyreals for the SpellSiphon tool at vendors.
// VendorSpellsiphonStackSize: Max units per purchase for blank Spellsiphon at vendors (trade-note style; unit price = VendorPrice). <= weenie MaxStackSize.
// VendorManaLatticePrice: Pyreal value per blank Mana Lattice at vendors (per unit for stackable sale).
// VendorManaLatticeMaxBuy: Max units per purchase for blank Mana Lattice at vendors.
